title: Tab Bar
description: Create a simple Bottom Tab Bar navigation with two distinct 'Home' and 'Settings' screens.
problemStatement:
Switch views! Use `createBottomTabNavigator` to define a navigator with two screens: `Home` and `Settings`. 

**Requirement:** Wrap the screens inside a `<Tab.Navigator>` container.
hints: Tab navigation is common for high-level sections of a mobile application.
expectedOutput: A Bottom Tab Menu setup with two clickable icons/text labels
